name: Deadlock
description: The product contains multiple threads or executable segments that are waiting for each other to release a necessary lock, resulting in a deadlock where no thread can proceed, causing denial of service through resource consumption or system hang.
detection_pattern: Multiple CONTROL[thread] nodes each hold a CONTROL[lock] on different STORAGE[resource] nodes while waiting for the other's lock, creating a circular dependency without a CONTROL[lock_ordering] or CONTROL[timeout] mechanism to prevent or break the cycle
graph_query: CONTROL[thread_A lock_X]→CONTROL[wait lock_Y] and CONTROL[thread_B lock_Y]→CONTROL[wait lock_X] without CONTROL[lock_ordering|deadlock_prevention]
